fixture.description: Repo has a co-located *.spec.ts convention (foo.ts + foo.spec.ts). The diff adds a new exported function src/bar.ts with NO src/bar.spec.ts — the spec-existence check should flag it.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report surfaces that the new public function in src/bar.ts has no co-located test — either as a 'Spec Existence: MISSING' gate result OR as a finding at DEBT severity or higher — given the repo's *.spec.ts convention (foo.ts has foo.spec.ts). FAIL only if the missing test for bar.ts is not surfaced at all.

expected_behavior: Spec Existence check reports MISSING test for the new src/bar.ts
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT demand a test for the unchanged src/foo.ts (it already has one)
